scripts.build:source: if [ -f .env.local ]; then set -a; . ./.env.local; set +a; fi && zen build:source
scripts.build:electron: if [ -f .env.local ]; then set -a; . ./.env.local; set +a; fi && zen build:electron
scripts.publish:source: if [ -f .env.local ]; then set -a; . ./.env.local; set +a; fi && zen publish:source
scripts.postinstall: for d in plugins/*; do [ -f "$d/package.json" ] && (echo "[postinstall] $d" && cd "$d" && "$npm_execpath" install) || true; done
